1. CALL db.relationshipTypes() YIELD relationshipType RETURN relationshipType ORDER BY relationshipType

MATCH (client)-[r]->(server)
    WITH
        type(r) AS InterfaceName,
        collect(DISTINCT coalesce(server.labelV, head(labels(server)), server.name, toString(id(server)))) AS Servers,
        collect(DISTINCT coalesce(client.labelV, head(labels(client)), client.name, toString(id(client)))) AS Clients
    RETURN InterfaceName, Servers, Clients
    ORDER BY InterfaceName
